subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Name through which the treasuries of Thy knowledge were made manifest and the repositories of Thy Command were brought forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باسمک الذی به ظهرت کنائز علمک و برزت خزائن امرک و
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for protection
